title: Ligia cilicica
taxonomy: Ligia cilicica is a species of isopod crustacean in the family Trachelipodidae. It is classified within the genus Ligia, which contains several species of terrestrial isopods found primarily in Asia and Europe. The genus Ligia is part of the subfamily Trachelipodinae, which is a subgroup of terrestrial isopods. The family Trachelipodidae is a group of terrestrial isopods found in a variety of habitats worldwide, and is classified within the order Isopoda. The classification of Ligia cilicica is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Malacostraca, Order: Isopoda, Family: Trachelipodidae, Genus: Ligia, Species: L. cilicica.
